gaps: AFFiNE's GraphQL API exposes document data, but canvas spatial modeling and safe repair workflows need agent-oriented command composition.
patterns: Use generated GraphQL coverage for breadth and hand-authored canvas commands for spatial AFFiNE workflows.

novel_features.name: Canvas layout planner
novel_features.description: Builds a deterministic AFFiNE canvas card layout from a compact JSON tree spec.
novel_features.rationale: Agents can plan spatial boards before touching live AFFiNE data.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before applying or reviewing a new canvas structure.

novel_features.name: Canvas model normalizer
novel_features.description: Normalizes AFFiNE canvas JSON into explicit nodes and connectors.
novel_features.rationale: Raw Blocksuite/Y.js shapes are too noisy for reliable agent inspection.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when comparing or auditing canvas structure.

novel_features.name: Canvas plan validator
novel_features.description: Checks planned canvas nodes and connectors for invalid geometry and orphaned links.
novel_features.rationale: Canvas writes need a local safety gate before mutation.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before applying generated canvas plans.

novel_features.name: Canvas dry-run apply
novel_features.description: Converts a canvas plan into explicit dry-run operations without enabling live Y.js writes.
novel_features.rationale: Agents need a reviewable operation list before modifying AFFiNE documents.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to inspect the exact operations a plan would perform.

novel_features.name: Canvas card image patch
novel_features.description: Patches an existing AFFiNE canvas card image/logo while preserving card identity and text.
novel_features.rationale: Replacing a whole card to update an image breaks layout and links.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this when a visual card asset needs to change without rebuilding the board.

novel_features.name: Canvas document integrity check
novel_features.description: Checks AFFiNE canvas document snapshots for structural issues such as missing children maps.
novel_features.rationale: Broken Blocksuite/Y.js parent-child state can hide blocks that still exist.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before repairing a canvas that renders incomplete content.

novel_features.name: Canvas document repair
novel_features.description: Repairs a narrow set of AFFiNE canvas integrity issues with dry-run and backup controls.
novel_features.rationale: Common missing-children corruption needs a bounded, auditable repair command.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this only after integrity diagnostics identify a supported repair.
